subject: Use the onap image
commit_message:
Use the onap image

Use the baseline image for onap: onap/integration-java11:7.1.0

Issue-ID: CLAMP-943
Signed-off-by: sebdet <sebastien.determe@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: I9207c2861e82a0506c47213ecd2876aa1a4c6b79
Signed-off-by: sebdet <sebastien.determe@intl.att.com>
